field_changes.old: Training Preferences just got smarter — you can now label injuries as Mild or Severe so your Adaptive Plan better understands how to work around what's bothering you. The reworked injury check-in lets you pick a recovery outcome per injury, and there's a new "I don't have any injury" option when you're back to full strength. Tapping Done on the keyboard now logs your set, plus a handful of bug fixes.
field_changes.new: Logging your sets just got more fluid — hitting Done on the keyboard now instantly logs the set and dismisses the keyboard in one go, so nothing breaks your workout rhythm. Plus a handful of bug fixes along the way.

field_changes.note: compared against last real version (a2449991); intervening snapshots reported a sentinel
